mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", reporter.name AS "reportedByName", assigned.name AS "assignedByName", rectifier.name AS "rectificationUserName", reviewer.name AS "reviewUserName", closer.name AS "closedByName" FROM issue_ticket a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account reporter ON reporter.id = a.reported_by LEFT JOIN sys_account assigned ON assigned.id = a.assigned_by LEFT JOIN sys_account rectifier ON rectifier.id = a.rectification_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account reviewer ON reviewer.id = a.review_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account closer ON closer.id = a.closed_by
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.projectName}, '%') AND p.name LIKE '%' || #{params.projectName} || '%'
AND a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%') AND a.title LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%'
AND a.source_type = #{params.sourceType} AND a.status = #{params.status}
ORDER BY a.reported_at DESC, a.id DESC

SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", reporter.name AS "reportedByName", assigned.name AS "assignedByName", rectifier.name AS "rectificationUserName", reviewer.name AS "reviewUserName", closer.name AS "closedByName" FROM issue_ticket a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account reporter ON reporter.id = a.reported_by LEFT JOIN sys_account assigned ON assigned.id = a.assigned_by LEFT JOIN sys_account rectifier ON rectifier.id = a.rectification_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account reviewer ON reviewer.id = a.review_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account closer ON closer.id = a.closed_by WHERE a.id = #{id}
